case_title: KAI FAI CHOI VS. LUN WU

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO OCT-12-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY VIVIAN CHOY--CANTONESE INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
